Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.auth

Class Auth0JSONAutheticationSource

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.auth.Auth0JSONAutheticationSource
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAuthenticationSource
public class Auth0JSONAutheticationSource extends Object implements IAuthenticationSource
This class authenticates a VStar user via an http POST method that makes use of an Auth0 web service to obtain user information.

  • Method Details

    • authenticate

      public boolean authenticate(String uuid, String code) throws AuthenticationError, ConnectionException
      Description copied from interface: IAuthenticationSource
      Authenticate against this authentication source.
      Specified by:
      authenticate in interface IAuthenticationSource
      Parameters:
      uuid - The user name to use for authentication.
      code - The password to use for authentication.
      Returns:
      Whether or not we have successfully authenticated.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationError - if there was some other error during authentication.
      ConnectionException - if there was an authentication source connection error.

    • parseJSONString

      public static Map<String,String> parseJSONString(String json)
      Given a JSON string, return a map of keys to value strings.
      Parameters:
      json - A JSON string.
      Returns:
      A mapping from key to string value.
